hero.title: Power Solutions Built for Tomorrow's Demands
hero.subtitle: On Capacitor engineers high-performance capacitor systems for industrial, commercial, and R&D applications — delivering reliability where it matters most.

features.title: Built for Performance. Designed for Reliability.
features.lead: We combine decades of electrical engineering expertise with modern manufacturing to deliver capacitor solutions that exceed expectations.

items.title: High Energy Density
items.body: Our capacitors deliver industry-leading energy density ratios, enabling compact designs without sacrificing performance or longevity.

items.title: Certified Quality
items.body: Every unit undergoes rigorous testing and quality control, meeting international safety and performance certifications across all product lines.

items.title: Custom Engineering
items.body: Standard solutions rarely fit unique challenges. Our engineers work directly with your team to design capacitors tailored to your exact specifications.

about_teaser.title: Decades of Expertise in Capacitor Technology
body: On Capacitor was founded on a simple belief: that precision-engineered energy storage components should be accessible to every engineer, researcher, and manufacturer who needs them.

From our facility, we design and manufacture capacitor systems that power everything from industrial automation to cutting-edge research equipment — with the same commitment to quality on every order.

products_preview.title: Solutions for Every Application
products_preview.lead: From high-voltage film capacitors to custom supercapacitor modules — browse our full range or contact us to discuss your requirements.

cta.title: Ready to power your next project?
cta.body: Talk to our engineering team and find the right capacitor solution for your application.
